description: Residential + light commercial roofing — full roof replacement, repair, storm/insurance claims, commercial flat roof, gutters, metal/specialty, inspection.

bullets: Hook: "Roof over 15 years old? Replace now and save before next storm season." Age-anchored urgency works
Format: Drone before/after video of a recent install — proof of capability beats every other format
CTA: "Get a Free Roof Estimate" — never use "Book Now" on a $15K+ purchase
Offer: 0% financing for 24 months + free drone inspection — financing is the killer feature, not discount
Angle: Target homeowners 35–70, home value $300K+, 10+ years in home; layer in 'home renovation' interest
Hook: "Small leak today, ceiling damage tomorrow." Fear-of-escalation beats price framing
Format: Quick diagnostic video — "3 signs your roof is leaking before you see water"
CTA: "Schedule a Same-Week Repair" — repair is urgent intent, not consideration
Offer: Free leak diagnosis + transparent flat-rate pricing posted in ad creative
Angle: Boost after every major rainstorm in geo — weather-triggered campaigns dominate this category
Hook: "Hail in [city] last week? Most homeowners don't realize they have damage." Hyper-local timing
Format: Single image with damage close-up + "We handle the insurance claim for you" overlay
CTA: "Get a Free Storm Damage Inspection" — 100% claim-eligible homeowners convert at 8–12%
Offer: Free inspection + claim filing + deductible-only out-of-pocket where state allows
Angle: Spin up campaigns within 48 hrs of NOAA hail/wind events; geo-fence the storm path; high CPM tolerance
Hook: "Tired of patching the same leak every spring?" Lead with operational pain, not product spec
Format: Case study lead-form ad — commercial buyers want references and warranty depth
CTA: "Request a Site Walkthrough" — never phone CTA for commercial
Offer: Free roof life assessment with thermal scan — opens door to a 7-figure replacement
Angle: Job-title (facility manager, property mgmt, building owner) + B2B interests; commercial roof life is 15–20 yrs, so age the building
Hook: "Overflowing gutters in last storm? You're one rainfall from foundation damage."
Format: Static before/after of gutter guards or clean install — simple, cheap to test variants
CTA: "Get a Free Gutter Quote" — easy yes, low-ticket adds to existing roof job
Offer: Free gutters with full roof replacement — bundle play, never sell standalone in cold ads
Angle: Retarget every roof-replacement form fill with a gutter add-on offer — pure margin uplift
Hook: "Last roof you'll ever buy — 50-year warranty, hail-rated." Lifetime-value angle
Format: High-production drone reel of finished metal roof — premium product needs premium creative
CTA: "Book a Premium Roof Consultation" — language elevates perceived quality
Offer: Lock in pre-season pricing + warranty transfer for resale — long-term value framing
Angle: Higher income (100K+), home value (500K+), 'sustainable home' interest stack; longer sales cycle, retarget hard
Hook: "Free 21-point roof inspection — drone + thermal, no pressure." Specificity sells the freebie
Format: Reel of the actual drone-inspection process — demystify what they're signing up for
CTA: "Book My Free Inspection" — lowest-friction entry point in roofing; use as top-of-funnel for all other categories
Offer: Free written report with photos emailed within 24 hours — sets you apart from "free estimate" competitors
Angle: Run year-round at low budget — inspection leads convert downstream into repair, replacement, gutters, insurance
